corrected_fields.summary: This is an academic research paper (32 pages) by Marek Rutkowski and Huansang Xu examining pricing and hedging frameworks for cross-currency equity protection swaps (EPS), using Monte Carlo simulations and approximation methods. The paper was originally submitted September 28, 2024 and revised April 9, 2026. It is purely theoretical/quantitative finance research focused on derivative pricing models.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This source does not address market structure or macro catalysts and should be excluded from the archive per CORE RULE 1. It is theoretical academic research with no relevance to market microstructure, trading operations, monetary policy, or economic data releases.
